gate_checks.role: records that the RunAll restricted-continuation route has an explicit successor chain through norm-control payload closure
records that boundary flux is classified through the selected boundary-sign branch path
records that the energy inequality route has a declared transfer path into norm control
prevents the gate from being misread as full RR theorem closure

positive: Records the RR restricted-continuation route closure gate after the norm-control theorem closure payload.
Assembles the documented RunAll route chain into a verifier-visible gate surface.
Keeps the distinction between route-gate closure and full RR theorem proof explicit.
negative: Does not prove the norm-control theorem.
Does not prove the formal restricted-continuation theorem.
Does not prove the full RR theorem.
Does not discharge all analytic assumptions in Lean.
Does not claim full RR closure.
Does not claim final scientific closure.
